name: /standards-add: written entry includes plugin-internal added_by:operator and added_at:<ISO-8601 UTC> per §2.6
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://x.com --id x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript && grep -E "added_by: operator" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E "added_at: 20[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
